reviews.title: Glitchy smartwatch has a mind of its own
reviews.text:
I've been using this smartwatch for about five weeks. There are tons of watch faces to choose from, but I couldn't find any with just the info I wanted at a glance: time, date, steps, and weather. I found one watch face with everything but weather and loaded that, but the watch face spontaneously changes several times a day to designs I've never selected. I don't like having to reset it with my phone every few hours to get back to my preferred watch face.

It vibrates at random times and shows me (what I believe is) some sort of prompt to reset it. Sometimes it prompts me for voice commands or makes phone calls for no apparent reason. I erased my contacts, so I hope it won't accidentally wrist-dial anyone else.

It needs to be recharged every 2-3 days — not every ten days as claimed for "Bluetooth daily usage mode" — and I'm NOT using the majority of its supposed features.

I've reached out to customer support a few times, but they say I'm doing something wrong. I'm just wearing it; the glitches happen whether I'm moving or still. Support has been no help at all. I haven't been able to find information on how to make it work as advertised online either, but at least Google doesn't blame me for the faulty product.

reviews.title: Un-binds Constantly...
reviews.text: It wont update, most of the watch faces don't download correctly. It decides on it's own when to un-bind from blu tooth. The only reason i'm not returning is because it's comfortable and it tracks my steps and tells time. Literally the only things I use. However, you do not receive messages, you miss calls, and it struggles to bind to your phone. I have had to re-install the app numerous times. When i complained to the online chat. they suggested re-installing the app. That was their only answer to any questions. Doesn't seem like anyone knows really what's going on. either way, if you want to "phone/messages" part of the watch, i highly suggest shopping for a different one.

reviews.title: Face size is great for reading it without glasses
reviews.text: I like being able to see the face and read it without my glasses. I didn't turn on any of the special features like phone, pictures, messaging, etc; mainly because it's made in China, but I'm sure I'm giving away info anyway. Unlike the Fitbit, this doesn't have a way to list and track your food intake and glucose readings. I bought it inorder to read the time, steps, etc, without glasses.

reviews.title: Big upgrade over the original
reviews.text:
Feels great, doesn't leave marks on my skin which the fitbit one did. Only had to adjust it once, taking it off/on is like a rubber band.
Also I really like the way the metal looks for where it meets the fitbit

reviews.title: Finally a comfortable stretchy band
reviews.text: This watch band, that I have for my FitBit Inspire 2 is just what I was looking for. I hated the band that came with it.  I tried another buckle, cloth band, which was ok, but still a challenge to take on and off of my wrist.  This band is easy to attach to the Fit bit watch, and the length is adjustable (which I think is unusual for a slip-on stretchy band.  I even am ok with the multi color.  It makes it easy to pair up with lots of tops.  It can be adjusted in length to most everyone's wrist.  I have a very small wrist (short woman here) and I was able to make it small enough for me. But there is also a lot of room for expansion.

reviews.title: Very cute
reviews.text: Very cute but not durable at all! It’s already stretched out😢

reviews.title: Your “cake pants” band
reviews.text: This is super comfortable. I’ve got a few bands at this point. Resin (oooh, pretty). Leather (old school charm). Canvas (slick). Silicone, of course (modern). This one is like putting on your cake pants after Thanksgiving Dinner. It’s not the prettiest but it’s just fine. More than fine. You can live (too much?) in this thing…

reviews.title: great bands, they do take in sweat smell though
reviews.text: first bands to not give me a blister!! they do start to smell though with sweat, have to wash it frequently.

reviews.title: doesn't stay on securely
reviews.text: I've purchased one of these in the past and liked it, but the gold color faded so I l reordered another it in black. However, this time, one side kept disconnecting and the attachment site looked defective compared to the other side causing me to almost lose my Fitbit twice. Luckily, I was indoors and heard it drop. I will return it and try a different brand as I fear I will encounter this issue again if I simply replace it.  This style is nice because it's easy to put on and off even with a single hand as opposed to the type of bracelet that comes with the Fitbit.

reviews.title: Worried the magnet will damage device
reviews.text: I wanted a band that would have more variability in fit, and I liked the color, so I ordered this.  It is, indeed, compatible with the Fitbit Sense and I enjoyed it for several days until I had to charge my Sense.  I then discovered that the magnet was so strong that I had difficulty keeping it off the back of my device long enough to get the charger on.  I was worried that strong magnet might damage the circuits and contacted FitBit for their opinion.  They weren't sure, but pointed out that they do have a hook-and-loop wristband in-house that is available.  Since I was also having trouble with the edges of the VNCAS band getting caught on my wool shawl and anything else fuzzy I wore, I decided to ditch it for the FitBit brand option.  Sorry, but I can't recommend this one.

reviews.title: Not Well Made😳
reviews.text: Initially when I bought this watch band, I thought it was nice, solid and seemed to be well made. I've been wearing it just a little over 2 months now and there's some sharp little burrs that have now showed up on the watch band itself and the edges of the other parts are now seeming to be sharp as well and keep getting hung up on my clothing and have also scratched my boyfriend several times. The finish is wearing off on the backside of the magnet connector area so now it looks very tarnished. I do wear it everyday all day long, but I don't feel after such a short period of time it should look so bad and have these sharp edges now. Unfortunately it's past my return window so I'm going to have to just throw it away and get another one. Such a shame because I really like the magnetic band and the color. I'm a little bit leery about buying another similar style for fear that the same thing will happen again. 😳

reviews.title: Cute but it snags
reviews.text: It snags on everything. Ugh. So I can't wear it with nice blouses or sweaters it gets caught and causes holes, runs, etc. Otherwise I love it.

reviews.title: Like the fact that it's magnetic
reviews.text: Be careful since it's magnetic it may stick to your silverware or metal objects

reviews.title: Love this watch
reviews.text: Nice looking watch with accurate steps. I love the gps feature where it shows your walk on a true map on the app. Nice visual. Heart rate is very accurate as well. Haven't used music feature as much as I thought I would. Garmin makes a nice watch. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Heart rate way off
reviews.text:
The main thing I bought this for is to monitor heart rate while hiking. Its reading is way off for me - as confirmed by a pulse ox and manually counting. The watch kept telling me my heart rate was over 100 just around the house. I have nsvt but my heart rate generally runs low. So I'm very sensitive when I have palpitations - when this watch kept saying my heart rate was over 95 I wasnt buying it. That brings into question any other readings or parameters.

I find the watch annoying and frustrating to use. The watch face does not interact very well for me. I'm constantly trying to tap it and it wont register so then the screen shuts off. Another annoying thing is it tells you to start moving around when I'm doing housework. I guess you can shut that off but I've really lost interest. Hopefully Garmin can offer some fix for the reading since its past the return date.

The positives - watch is comfortable and I don't wear jewelry. I forget its on. Its a large size so its readable if you have vision issues. I've had no problem with that.

reviews.title: Lightweight and perfect for small wrists
reviews.text: This is a great lightweight fitness tracker.  It has about a 4 day battery life and does a quick recharge.  It has a little learning curve for the activity tracking but it is right up there with my Apple Watch.

reviews.title: Exelente
reviews.text: La bateria me dura 14 dias. Pantalla se ve perfectamente bajo el sol. La app connect trabaja muy bien, en la tienda puedo descargar pantallas para el reloj. Resto de las actividades ok. Lo recomiendo

reviews.title: Large Screen-Bright White Band
reviews.text: I like everything about this except that I didn’t realize that the frame and the band would be a Brilliant white! There is a golden strip surrounding the watch face.

reviews.title: Watch is good, not great with mybphone
reviews.text:
The watch is great. Synched quickly with the app and I like the number of different face options offered. The battery life is also strong and it charges quickly.
Things I didn't like. If you touch the face it quickly unlocks and scrolls through the menus. So when I cross my arms I can mess up the watch, it needs a better lock. The app didn't synch all options to my watch/phone. So, I couldn't track sleep, heartrate and other things.
Maybe if I have a better phone?

reviews.title: Kids love it
reviews.text: It is a generic version of a smart watch but the kids don’t realize it as it works almost exactly as the real thing. It tells the time, lets you make and receive calls and text and you download the app just like you would with the real thing. It’s easy to set up. Comes with a charging cord. Connects to any phone. #FoundItOnAmazon

reviews.title: Great Apple alternative!
reviews.text: Got this for my mom, here it is next to my Apple Watch, it has pretty much all the same features as the Apple at about a quarter of the price. The battery lasts all day and seems to be on par with the battery life of my watch. The app is easy to use and my mom loves it!

reviews.title: Awesome Smart Watch
reviews.text:
For the money, this is an awesome smart watch that has some of the same popular features as that “fruit” brand.
The watch was packaged securely in a box and included a User Manual and a “How to Connect with the smart watch” brochure.

My watch was received with 46% battery life and did not need to be charged immediately, but I noticed that the charge cord is magnetic and attaches easily to the back of the watch.

I read the instructions and powered on the watch. I downloaded the app and proceeded to pair, referred to as “bind” in the manual. The smart watch paired effortlessly with my iPhone 13. Other than pairing or unpairing, the user manual doesn’t cover much else, but I found the watch use to be intuitive. I do think a more detailed user manual would be helpful to explain navigating and swipe direction of the screens.

The watch has many functions and I was pleasantly surprised that the watch provided a “Siri connection” and performed flawlessly. I compared the blood pressure and oxygen sensors to my individual monitors to check accuracy. Surprisingly, the watch is pretty accurate.

As I mentioned earlier, I started using the watch with 46% battery life and wore the watch for approximately 25 hours before I received a low battery alert.

This is a great buy and so much so, that within hours of using my watch, I ordered another one for my husband.

reviews.title: Best watch yet!
reviews.text: I'm very impressed with this smart watch. It has so many features and works well. Definitely recommend it.

Track your movement all the time through the gaps connected to your phone during running mode to get real-time statistics such as pace and distance on the track. Open the GPS function on your phone and place the GPS tracking in the APPLICATION, then you can see your athletic track and share it on Twitter or Facebook, etc.
Simple charge, Long Standby
The fitness tracker built-in USB plug,simply connect it to any universal power adapter, PC or power bank without requiring a particular adapter, one single charge(about 1-2 hours) gives you up to 5-7 days of working time.
Tips:
1. This fitness tracker uses a USB charging cable to charge and the standby time is usually 5-7 days. 2.The sleep monitor function will activate automatically in night time. Please wear it when sleep,generallywaking up display after 10-30 minutes.
features: 【Multifunctional Smart Watch】24 hours dynamic heart rate monitor and blood pressure monitor, sleep monitor helping you adjust yourself for a healthier lifestyle, calls and message smart reminder, Calorie Counter, pedometer, search phone, sedentary reminder, remote camera control, GPS Tracking etc...
【Blood Pressure Monitor】Smart blood pressure monitor measure your Systolic, Diastolic blood pressure every moment you want, sync record on app by date.

reviews.title: Blue is more purple

This band is also a little stiffer than the floppy Garmin band, and I think I actually like the feel of this stiffer band.

title: Garmin Instinct 2, dezl Edition, Rugged Trucking Smartwatch, Easy Break Planning, Compatible with the dezl OTR Navigator, Black
description: Instinct® 2 - dēzl™ Edition is the first rugged smartwatch designed specifically for professional truck drivers who want trackable health metrics, short-break workouts and many truck plaza conveniences for over-the-road lifestyles. Enjoy all-day health monitoring features that track your heart rate, sleep, Pulse Ox, respiration and more (Pulse Ox not available in all countries. This device is intended to give an estimation of your activity and metrics; it is not a medical device). Pair this watch with the dēzl™ app on your compatible smartphone for workout tutorials that fit within standard break times. When using the dēzl app, take advantage of truck plaza loyalty programs with Love’s Travel Stops and Pilot Flying J Travel Centers, and Garmin Pay™ contactless payments help you breeze through checkout lines with a supported country and payment network. Save time and improve efficiency with PrePass® U.S. weigh station and bypass notifications viewed right on your watch, using your active PrePass account and the dēzl app on your compatible smartphone.

reviews.title: Would be the perfect watch if the battery was replaceable
reviews.text:
I normally don't like smart watches because I hate the idea of spending hundreds of dollars on something with a non-replaceable battery that will wear out in a few years rendering the watch useless. Even though I do love my new Instinct 2 watch, I'm still not crazy about the wasteful business model of smart watches, and am not sure I will buy another after this one. That said, the Instinct 2 is a near perfect watch in almost every way... it is feature packed, fully customizable (without being over the top), has a long battery life, and is very comfortable as a daily driver watch.

I use mine for the usual day-to-day watch stuff, and hiking primarily. I don't use any of the smart phone or health features (heart rate, pulse ox, etc.) as I don't care about them. I use the compass, altimeter, and gps tracking features frequently, and they all work great.

Overall, this is a fantastic watch for what it is. However, I really, REALLY hate that it has a non-replaceable battery that will inevitably wear out after only a few years. I know that this is the case as I had a Fenix 5 before this one that lasted about 4 years before the battery began dying quickly. It essentially became a $500 door stop after that...

reviews.title: Smart sports watch with extreme battery life.
reviews.text: In my opinion, this is the perfect smart sports watch. Great battery life, but all the sport features you need. Sure its not color or touch screen, but the utility is as good as it gets.

reviews.title: Great GPS Watch!
reviews.text: So far, so good! I’ve only had this watch for two days, but I’m convinced I made the right choice. I like the color and I have already made a watch face on garmin.facebuilder. It’s new to me but I watched many YouTube videos about this watch, so I knew I’d be able to pick it up quickly. I haven’t been out in the sun enough to appraise the solar capabilities, but I’m quite sure it will be less than they advertised. I’m happy with it just the same! I recommend this watch.

reviews.title: 5-star product!
reviews.text: You have to love it when a product, even something as simple as a thin piece of plastic, outperforms your expectations. Packaged extremely well with everything you'd possibly need, I had my watch cleaned, prepped and completed in minutes. I will use the Skinomi brand for my iPad, Kindle Fire and Samsung Galaxy S III as soon as their old (non-Skinomi) screen protectors need replacement.

reviews.title: Really impressed
reviews.text: Got this for my Sony LiveView and while I was shocked to see that the installation process was more than other screen protectors (ie cell phone screen protectors), installation was pretty simple. After it dries, you can't even tell a screen protector is on!

reviews.title: It's soft
reviews.text:
Like another reviewer had mentioned, they are soft. I used a rubber squeegee that I've used on countless other screen savers, and it actually damaged the skin. It has permanent "bubbles" (more like dents) in it that will not go away. Other than that, the fit is perfect. And the skin comes very nicely packaged with everything you could ever need, including a bottle of soapy water for the application.

The attention to detail by Skinomi is second to none. The company gets five stars, but I've got to deduct one for the soft material. Skinomi did include a squeegee, but it's too big for use with this skin. Had I cut it down to size and used it, I may not have "dents" now.

reviews.title: Good idea

reviews.title: extremely comfortable
reviews.text: I was looking for a replacement band because the plastic band that came with the watch was causing me to develop a minor rash under the band.  (I suspect this was due to the moisture trapped under the band after hand washing.) At any rate, the band allows the watch to be moved out of the way, while hand washing. The band is also very comfortable. Changing the band was very easy to change out.

title: Cubitt CT2S Series 3 Smart Watch 1.69" Touch Screen, Fitness Tracker, with Heart Rate, Blood Oxygen, Stress and Sleep Monitor, IP68 Waterproof, Step Counter, Pedometer Smartwatch for Women Men
features: PREMIUM DISPLAY: Large 1.69-inch TFT-LCD color HD touch screen featuring customized displays, wake up function to easily see time, date, steps, calories and distance. You can personalize the dial with many of our style options, and can even upload a personal picture to be on your smart watch background

SMART FUNCTIONS: Receive Call, Text, Whatsapp and Social Media notifications. Incoming calls can be alerted via vibration reminders, with the option to hang up. Display up to 128 characters on your tracker screen. Sedentary alerts can be turned On, to be alerted with vibration reminders after a specific time of no movement. Alarm clock + timer, and calendar alerts are also shown on the screen as notifications. Option to sync data with Strava

ALL DAY FITNESS TRACKING: Track your daily activities with a built-in accelerometer sensor that allows you to track distance traveled, record steps, get calories burned, and review active minutes, including pace. Your workout progress can be simply viewed directly from our app, by choosing between 14 different sports modes including Outdoor / Outdoor Running and Walking, Outdoor cycling, Spinning bike, Cricket, Hiking, Swimming, Yoga,Rowing machine, Elliptical trainer, Fitness, and others

HEART RATE, BLOOD OXYGEN, SLEEP AND STRESS MONITOR: Automatically monitors your daily heart rate, blood oxygen and stress. You can read directly on the watch all day, which helps you understand your health and make reasonable adjustments on your life style. Also monitors your sleep which gives you a comprenhensive analysis of your sleep. Our app allows you to review graphs that analyze how deep or light is your sleep and your wake-up times.

APP PAIRING AND BATTERY: pairing is simple, by using Bluetooth 4.2, automatically sync your device to a phone using iOS 8. 0/Android OS 4. 4 or above. Built with a 300mAh battery that takes less than 2 hours to charge and can be used for up to 10 days with a standby time of 30-45 days. You can adjust the screen brightness according to your needs

reviews.title: Great watch for a great price
reviews.text: I was skeptical about the watch as I had purchased other watches only to have them fail miserably. This watch turned out great. The most important thing to do is read the manual. Especially about how to wear the watch, which is a little higher than a normal watch. This will make the accuracy much better. The step counter is controlled by arm movement not actual steps, so if you walk stiff armed , it will be inaccurate. Move your arms when walking , the watch will be much more accurate.Make sure you go into the app on your phone and activate the exercises your interested in. This will help the watch to track it better. Also activate the media part of the app for sms,email etc. You can also monitor who is calling you, so you can choose to answer you phone or not. I am extremely pleased with my purchase and will be watching for other products from this company.

reviews.title: Loved it..: til it burned me!
reviews.text: I loved it until I woke up with a burn!!

reviews.title: As advertised
reviews.text: Great watch! Exactly what I wanted (a watch to count steps and that is easy to read). The set up was fairly easy - I received the watch in the early evening and had it set up within half an hour ( I am in my seventies). This is my 3rd watch - first was very expensive and too invasive - second watch cost twice as much as this one and quit charging in the second week - third times a charm.

reviews.title: Hard to set up.
reviews.text: Very difficult to program. I will be sending it back.

reviews.title: There were very little instructions on how to use/set up the watch.  Had to go online to search.
reviews.text: Face of watch is good, and seems like good quality.  Plus I like that it is a touch screen/can swipe.
